title: 3 Excellent Dividend Stocks to Add to Your Holiday Shopping List
text: These dividend stocks look like great buys right now.

title: Can Apartment REITs Handle Higher Interest Expense?
text: Some REITs will see far more pressure on AFFO per share going into 2023. We dug through the debts for each REIT and prepared a model for the impact of higher rates.

title: How I'd Invest $10,000 Today -- Including Real Estate -- if I Had to Start From Scratch
text: Got an extra $10K in your account? Grab some yield and potential returns with a few REITs and a handful of other dividend-delivery deals.

title: These Were The Five Best- And Worst-Performing Real Estate Stocks In October 2022
text: Real estate stocks help investors insulate their portfolio against rising inflation.

title: Equity Residential to Participate in Nareit REITWorld Annual Conference
text: CHICAGO--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that members of the Company's senior management team, including the Company's President and CEO, Mark J. Parrell, will participate in the Nareit REITWorld Annual Conference on Tuesday and Wednesday, November 15 and 16, 2022. In connection with this event, the Company has issued an Investor Update which can be found in the Investor section of the Company's website at www.equityapartments.com.
